title: LOOGI Merry Christmas Ribbon 22m, 15mm Satin Ribbon Glitter Red Grosgrain Ribbon for Gift Wrapping Crafts Wreaths
features: Uniqueness: Specially designed "Merry Christmas", festive red printed with sparkling gold, which is unique in the entire market
Practicality: Total 22m in length and 15mm in width, can be cut into any length easily according to your needs
100% double faced polyester yarn, the gold pattern uses an expensive bronzing process, which will not fade for several years
Customer-friendly: The ribbon is rolled up for easy storage and the good packaging also makes it a nice gift
Versatile: Christmas gift wrapping, Crafts decoration, Wreaths decoration, Xmas tree and home decorations
